# IOUSBGetEndpointUsageType | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ USBDriverKit ](/documentation/usbdriverkit)

- [ IOUSBGetEndpointUsageType ](/documentation/usbdriverkit/iousbgetendpointusagetype)

-  IOUSBGetEndpointUsageType 

Function# IOUSBGetEndpointUsageType

DriverKit 19.0+

```
uint8_t IOUSBGetEndpointUsageType(const IOUSBEndpointDescriptor * descriptor);
```

## [ Parameters ](/documentation/usbdriverkit/iousbgetendpointusagetype#parameters)

`descriptor`The descriptor to parse

## [Return Value](/documentation/usbdriverkit/iousbgetendpointusagetype#return-value)

tEndpointUsageType indicating the type found.

## [Discussion](/documentation/usbdriverkit/iousbgetendpointusagetype#discussion)

Extract the usage type of an endpoint from an endpoint descriptor

This method parses an endpoint descriptor to determine its usage type. Only periodic endpoints have usage types
